testcase.name: test_get_credit_score_endpoint_exists
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_credit_score.py:65: in test_get_credit_score_endpoint_exists assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_request_otp_endpoint_exists
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_credit_score.py:104: in test_request_otp_endpoint_exists assert response.status_code in [200, 400], f"Unexpected status: {response.status_code}, body: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 500, body: {"detail":"Failed to request OTP: name 'httpx' is not defined"} E assert 500 in [200, 400] E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_request_otp_validation_pan_format
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_credit_score.py:158: in test_request_otp_validation_pan_format assert response.status_code in [200, 400, 422], f"Status: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Status: 500 E assert 500 in [200, 400, 422] E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_verify_otp_endpoint_exists
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_credit_score.py:175: in test_verify_otp_endpoint_exists assert response.status_code in [200, 400], f"Unexpected status: {response.status_code}, body: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 500, body: {"detail":"Failed to verify OTP: name 'httpx' is not defined"} E assert 500 in [200, 400] E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_experian_credentials_configured

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 500 assert 500 in [200, 400] + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_credit_score.py:302: in test_experian_credentials_configured assert response.status_code in [200, 400], f"Unexpected status: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 500 E assert 500 in [200, 400] E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
